summary: Complete testing of PSP Reserve Fund Module enhancements. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified with all features working correctly.

issues: Minor console warning: Chart width/height of -1 detected - Recharts container styling issue (non-blocking)

backend: GET /api/psp-summary - Returns total_reserve_fund_held for each PSP
GET /api/psp/{psp_id} - Returns reserve_fund_rate, gateway_fee, refund_fee, monthly_minimum_fee fields
GET /api/psps/{psp_id}/reserve-funds - Returns ledger array and summary object with correct structure
POST /api/psp - Creates PSP with gateway_fee, refund_fee, monthly_minimum_fee fields
POST /api/psps/reserve-funds/{txId}/release - Releases single reserve fund and credits treasury
POST /api/psps/reserve-funds/bulk-release - Returns 400 for empty transaction list
frontend: PSP Dashboard - Shows 4 stat cards: Total PSPs, Pending Settlement, Reserve Fund Held (with orange accent), Overdue Settlements
Reserve Fund Held card - Shows amount with orange accent styling and 'due for release' note
PSP Cards - Display 'Reserve Fund' label (not Chargeback) with percentage rate
PSP Cards - Show 'Reserve Held' amount in orange color
PSP Detail View - Shows 'Reserve Fund Rate' label (renamed from Chargeback)
PSP Detail View - Has 3 tabs: Pending Settlements, Reserve Fund, Settlement History
Reserve Fund Tab - Shows 4 summary cards: Total Held, Due This Week, Released, Holding Period
Reserve Fund Ledger Table - Has columns: Reference, Client, Tx Amount, Reserve Held, Hold Date, Release Date, Days Left, Status, Action
Status Badges - Held (red), Due (yellow), Released (green) correctly styled
Release Button - Single release button works for unreleased entries
Bulk Release - Checkbox selection and 'Release Selected' button available
Add PSP Form - Includes Reserve Fund %, Gateway Fee, Refund Fee, Monthly Min Fee fields
Pending Settlements - Deductions column shows 'Reserve:' instead of 'CB:'
Record Charges Dialog - Shows 'Reserve Fund Amount' label (not Chargeback Amount)

seed_data_creation: Existing PSPs used for testing: paypal (3% reserve, 2 days holding) and Uni pay (10% reserve, 180 days holding). Test PSP created and cleaned up during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PSP Reserve Fund module fully tested. Key features verified: 1) GET /api/psps/reserve-funds/global-summary returns total_held, total_released, due_for_release. 2) GET /api/psps/{psp_id}/reserve-funds returns ledger with entries containing transaction_id, reference, client_name, amount, reserve_fund_amount, hold_date, release_date, days_remaining, status. 3) POST /api/psps/reserve-funds/{txId}/release releases single reserve fund and credits to PSP's settlement_destination treasury account. 4) POST /api/psps/reserve-funds/bulk-release releases multiple at once. 5) PSP create/update supports gateway_fee, refund_fee, monthly_minimum_fee. 6) All 'Chargeback' references renamed to 'Reserve Fund' in UI.

dashboard_stat_cards.reserve_fund_held: Shows total held with orange accent, includes 'due for release' amount

psp_cards.reserve_held_amount: Shows held amount per PSP in orange color

psp_detail_tabs.reserve_fund: Full ledger with summary cards and release functionality
